sections.label: Six Courses (Europe or US Focus)
sections.description: Choose one of two tracks: Europe-focused (HIS-115, HIS-125, one US, one Asian, two additional) or US-focused (HIS-145, HIS-155, one European, one Asian, two additional).

options.title: Europe Focus: HIS-115, HIS-125, one US history, one Asian history, two additional
US Focus: HIS-145, HIS-155, one European history, one Asian history, two additional
